endpoints.name: Fetch Swagger information
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of the Swagger specification.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch all live streams
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your live streams.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation creates a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a live stream, including all assigned outputs and targets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation updates a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Regenerate the connection code for a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation regenerates the connection code of a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reset a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation resets a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Start a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation starts a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the state of a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation shows the current state of a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch metrics for an active live stream
endpoints.description: This operation returns a hash of metrics keys, each of which identifies a status, text description, unit, and value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Stop a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation stops a live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the thumbnail URL of a live stream
endpoints.description: This operation shows the thumbnail URL of a started live stream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all players
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your players.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a player
endpoints.description: This operation shows details of a specific player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a player
endpoints.description: This operation updates a player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Rebuild player code
endpoints.description: This operation rebuilds the player with the current configuration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the state of a player
endpoints.description: This operation shows the current state of a player.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all player URLs
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all player URLs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{PLAYER_ID}} with a real player_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a player URL
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a player URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PLAYER_ID}} with a real player_id.

endpoints.name: Delete a player URL
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a player URL.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PLAYER_ID}} with a real player_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all recordings
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your recordings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a recording
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific recording.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a recording
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a recording.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the state of a recording
endpoints.description: This operation shows the current state of a recording.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all schedules
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your schedules.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation creates a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation updates a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Disable a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation disables a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Enable a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation enables a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the state of a schedule
endpoints.description: This operation shows the current state of a schedule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all stream sources
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your stream sources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add a stream source
endpoints.description: This operation adds a stream source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Deprecated operation
endpoints.description: POST /stream_sources/add/ is deprecated. To add a stream source, use POST /stream_sources instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a stream source
endpoints.description: This operation shows details of a specific stream source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a stream source
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a stream source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a stream source
endpoints.description: This operation updates a stream source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all stream targets
endpoints.description: This operation lists the details of all of your stream targets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation creates a stream target. There are three types of targets that you can create: CustomStreamTarget for an an external, third-party destination; WowzaStreamTarget for a Wowza CDN target; or UltraLowLatencyStreamTarget for an ultra low latency Wowza CDN target. The availability of many parameters depends on the type of target you create.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Deprecated operation
endpoints.description: POST /stream_targets/add/ is deprecated. To add a stream target, use POST /stream_targets instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows details of a specific stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation updates a stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch current health metrics for an active Wowza ultra low latency stream target
endpoints.description: This operation returns a snapshot of the current connection and throughput details for an active target whose type is UltraLowLatencyStreamTarget. The interval for current metrics is 30 seconds from the moment of the query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch historic health metrics for a Wowza ultra low latency stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows historic connection and throughput details for target whose type is UltraLowLatencyStreamTarget.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Regenerate the connection code for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation regenerates the connection code of a stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch geo-blocking for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of geo-blocking applied to a specific stream target. Only stream targets whose type is WowzaStreamTarget can be geo-blocked.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all properties of a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of the properties assigned to a specific stream target. Properties can be applied to a CustomStreamTarget or WowzaStreamTarget whose provider is akamai_cupertino.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Create a property for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation creates a property for a stream target. Properties can be applied to a CustomStreamTarget or WowzaStreamTarget whose provider is akamai_cupertino. For more information see the technical article [How to set advanced properties by using the Wowza Streaming Cloud REST API](https://www.wowza.com/docs/how-to-set-advanced-properties-by-using-the-wowza-streaming-cloud-rest-api).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a property of a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific property assigned to a specific stream target. Properties can be applied to a CustomStreamTarget or WowzaStreamTarget whose provider is akamai_cupertino.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Delete a stream target property
endpoints.description: This operation removes a property from a stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch token authorization for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of the token authorization applied to a stream target. Only stream targets whose type is WowzaStreamTarget can use token authorization.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Create token authorization for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation creates token authorization for a stream target. Only stream targets whose type is WowzaStreamTarget can use token authorization. For more information see the technical article [How to protect stream targets with token authorization by using the Wowza Streaming Cloud REST API](https://www.wowza.com/docs/how-to-protect-streams-with-token-authorization-by-using-the-wowza-streaming-cloud-rest-api).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Update token authorization for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation updates the token authorization applied to a stream target. Only stream targets whose type is WowzaStreamTarget can use token authorization.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all transcoders
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of your transcoders.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation creates a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a transcoder, including all of its assigned output renditions and stream targets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation updates a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Disable a transcoder's stream targets
endpoints.description: This operation disables all of the stream targets assigned to a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Enable a transcoder's stream targets
endpoints.description: This operation enables all of the stream targets assigned to a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a transcoder's recordings
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of the recordings for a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reset a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation resets a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch transcoder's schedules
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of the schedules for a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Start a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation starts a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the state and uptime ID of a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the current state and uptime ID of a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch statistics for a current transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation responds with a hash of metrics (keys) for a currently running transcoder. Each key has a status, text (description), units, and value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Stop a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation stops a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch the thumbnail URL of a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the thumbnail URL of a started transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all outputs of a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of the output renditions of a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch an output
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific output rendition for a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete an output
endpoints.description: This operation deletes an output, including all of its assigned targets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Deprecated operation
endpoints.description: The operation POST /transcoders/{transcoder_id}/outputs/{id}/add_stream_target is deprecated. Use POST /transcoders/{transcoder_id}/outputs/{output_id}/output_stream_targets to add an existing stream target to an output.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Deprecated operation
endpoints.description: The operation DELETE /transcoders/{transcoder_id}/outputs/{id}/remove_stream_target is deprecated. Use DELETE /transcoders/{transcoder_id}/outputs/{output_id}/output_stream_targets/{id} to remove a stream target from an output.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all output stream targets of an output of a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of all of the output stream targets of an output of a transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch an output stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of an output stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Delete an output stream target
endpoints.description: This operation deletes an output stream target, including all of its assigned targets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Disable an output stream target
endpoints.description: This operation disables an output stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Enable an output stream target
endpoints.description: This operation enables an output stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Restart an output stream target
endpoints.description: This operation restarts an output stream target.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{OUTPUT_ID}} with a real output_id. Replace {{STREAM_TARGET_ID}} with a real stream_target_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a transcoder's properties
endpoints.description: This operation shows all of the properties of a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id.

endpoints.name: Create a property for a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation creates a property for a transcoder. For more information see the technical article [How to set advanced properties by using the Wowza Streaming Cloud REST API](https://www.wowza.com/docs/how-to-set-advanced-properties-by-using-the-wowza-streaming-cloud-rest-api).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch a property for a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific property for a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a transcoder's property
endpoints.description: This operation deletes a specific property from a specific transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch all uptime records for a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows all of the uptime records for a specific transcoder. An uptime record identifies a specific transcoding session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id.

endpoints.name: Fetch an uptime record
endpoints.description: This operation shows the details of a specific uptime record for a specific transcoder. An uptime record identifies a transcoding session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch current stream health metrics for an active transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation returns a snapshot of the current source connection and processing details of an active (running) transcoder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch historic stream health metrics for a transcoder
endpoints.description: This operation shows the historic source connection and processing details for a transcoding session (uptime record). The transcoder can be running or stopped. Metrics are recorded every 20 seconds.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{TRANSCODER_ID}} with a real transcoder_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Fetch network usage for all stream sources
endpoints.description: This operation shows the amount of network usage for all stream sources in the account. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch network usage for all stream targets
endpoints.description: This operation shows the amount of network usage for all stream targets in the account cumulatively and individually. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch network usage for all transcoders
endpoints.description: This operation shows the amount of network usage (egress) for all transcoders in the account. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch peak recording storage
endpoints.description: This operation shows the amount of peak recording storage used for the account. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch stream processing time
endpoints.description: This operation shows the amount of stream processing time used by all transcoders in the account. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch viewer data for a stream target
endpoints.description: This operation shows viewer data for a specific stream target. The default time frame is from the last billing date to the end of the current day.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{WOWZA_API_KEY}} with your WOWZA API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
